svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart TD
	A["delete(hash, guid, cb)"] --> B["readRecordMetadata()"]
	B --> C{Metadata exists?}
	C -->|Yes| D["Set metadata.Deleted = timestamp"]
	D --> E["persistRecordMetadata()"]
	C -->|No| F["Generate stub metadata"]
	E --> G["persistDelete()"]
	F --> G
	G --> H["callback()"]
","style":"notebook"}

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
